title: Thief Monkey
description: This mod adds sneaky Thief Monkeys that steal your items!
body:
# THIEF MONKEY 

![Thief Monkeys in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d58e30ccbd775e09c24987dd357b45385830ff05.png)

## 🐒 Information About The Mod!
- This mod basicaly adds Thief Monkeys to the game.
- You can find them in **Jungle Biome**.
- After they see you, They may chase you and steal items from your inventory.
- You can recover stolen items by feeding them a banana, or defeat them to reclaim your loot.
- Thief Monkeys can also be bred with bananas, just like other animals.
